summary: Tested P1 features: Revenue Dashboard with Subscriptions and Trial Alerts. All 5 features working correctly - backend APIs return proper subscription data in revenue breakdown, frontend displays Abonnements card with active/trial counts, AreaChart includes 5th 'Abonnements' line (teal), trial alerts render conditionally (not visible as no trials expiring within 5 days), and admin provider detail view shows subscription status with action log.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revenue dashboard now shows subscription data with 5 source cards (inscriptions, dons, sponsors, produits, abonnements). Abonnements card displays active_subs and trial_subs counts instead of 'Bientot disponible' placeholder. AreaChart has 5th line 'Abonnements' with teal color (#14b8a6). Trial alerts not visible because provider user_provider_001 has status='active' (not 'trial') with period_end ~2026-05-14. 4 pending subscription payments at 19€ each exist. Action log shows previous admin actions (gift, suspend, reactivate).

feature_1_revenue_breakdown_with_subscri.details: GET /api/admin/revenue-breakdown returns sources.abonnements with fields: total=0€, fees=0€, count=0, pending_total=76€, pending_count=4, active_subs=1, trial_subs=0, label='Abonnements partenaires'. Monthly data includes 'abonnements' key. grand_total correctly includes subscription revenue.

feature_2_revenue_dashboard_ui.details: Revenus tab shows: Grand total banner (5,103.85€), 5 source cards (Inscriptions, Dons, Sponsors, Produits, Abonnements), Abonnements card shows '1 actif(s) · 0 en essai' (no 'Bientot disponible' placeholder), AreaChart with 5 lines including 'Abonnements' in teal, PieChart shows revenue distribution

feature_3_trial_alerts_backend.details: GET /api/admin/subscriptions returns subscriptions list with user_id, status, trial_end fields. Stats object includes total, trial, active, expired, cancelled counts.

feature_4_trial_alerts_ui.details: Trial alerts section renders conditionally based on trialAlerts array filtered from subscriptions with status='trial' and days_left<=5. Currently no subscriptions match criteria (provider has status='active' not 'trial'), so alert banner not visible - this is expected behavior.

feature_5_admin_provider_flow.details: Prestataires tab shows 7 stats cards (Total=2, Actifs=1, En attente=1, Suspendus=0, Abo Essai=0, Abo Actif=1, Rev. Abo=0€). Provider detail view shows: profile info, subscription card with ACTIVE status and 19€/mois, period_end=14 mai 2026, action buttons (Activer/Prolonger/Offrir/Résilier), revenue charts, subscription payments table, HISTORIQUE DES ACTIONS ADMIN with logged admin actions (gift, suspend, reactivate)

mocked_apis.note: No subscription payments completed yet - all 4 are pending
